diagrams.title: SQL Query Processing Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the logical order of SQL clause execution from FROM to ORDER BY
diagrams.purpose: Understanding execution order helps write correct complex queries with proper clause placement

diagrams.title: JOIN Types Visualization
diagrams.description: Venn diagram representation of different JOIN operations in SQL
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different joins combine data from multiple tables and which rows are preserved

diagrams.title: Subquery Types Classification
diagrams.description: Classification tree showing different subquery types and their characteristics
diagrams.purpose: Understanding subquery types helps choose the right approach for different query requirements
